hero.name: Nguyen Hoang Trung Khanh
hero.slogan: I build tomorrow from fragments of impossible

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate about building impactful digital experiences
about.bio: Hi, I'm Nguyen Hoang Trung Khanh, a second-year Information Technology student who is passionate about building meaningful digital experiences and continuously learning new technologies. I currently serve as the Secretary of my local Youth Union while also managing Social Media for the music group Ngồi Hát Đỡ Buồn, where I strengthen my leadership, communication, and content creation skills. Beyond technology, I enjoy traveling and photography, finding inspiration in every new place and every story captured through the lens. I'm always eager to embrace new challenges, grow both personally and professionally, and create impactful solutions through technology.
